name: Basement Jaxx
description: '''Basement Jaxx''' are an English [[electronic music]] duo consisting of Felix Buxton (born 8 May 1970) and Simon Ratcliffe (born 28 November 1969). The pair got their name from the regular club night they held in [[Brixton]], [[London]], [[United Kingdom|UK]]. They rose to popularity in the underground [[house music|house]] scene of the mid-1990s, and found international chart success and win Best Dance Act at both the 2002 and 2004 [[Brit Awards]]. Some of their most successful singles are "[[Red Alert (song)|Red Alert]]", "[[Rendez-Vu]]", "[[Romeo (Basement Jaxx song)|Romeo]]", "[[Where's Your Head At]]", "[[Do Your Thing (Basement Jaxx song)|Do Your Thing]]", and "[[Good Luck (Basement Jaxx song)|Good Luck]]".
